title: Randomized trial of empagliflozin in patients with heart failure
abstract: This multicenter randomized double-blind trial evaluated empagliflozin versus placebo in patients with heart failure with reduced ejection fraction. Primary outcome was cardiovascular death or hospitalization for heart failure.

title: Effect of dapagliflozin on cardiac function in type 2 diabetes: the DEFINE-HF trial
abstract: Randomized controlled trial of dapagliflozin in patients with HFrEF and type 2 diabetes. The primary endpoint was NT-proBNP at 12 weeks.

title: A phase 3 randomized trial of pembrolizumab in non-small cell lung cancer
abstract: This randomized open-label phase 3 trial compared pembrolizumab with docetaxel in patients with previously treated PD-L1-positive advanced non-small cell lung cancer. Primary endpoint was overall survival.

title: Sacubitril-valsartan versus enalapril in heart failure: PARADIGM-HF
abstract: Randomized double-blind trial comparing sacubitril-valsartan with enalapril in patients with heart failure and reduced ejection fraction. Primary composite outcome of cardiovascular death or hospitalization for heart failure.

title: Observational study of dietary habits in rural populations
abstract: Cross-sectional observational study examining dietary patterns and their association with chronic disease risk factors in rural communities across three provinces.
reason: Not an RCT, observational study, not cardiology-specific

title: Ticagrelor versus clopidogrel in acute coronary syndromes: PLATO trial
abstract: Randomized double-blind trial comparing ticagrelor with clopidogrel in patients with acute coronary syndromes. The primary endpoint was a composite of cardiovascular death, myocardial infarction, or stroke.

title: Effects of mindfulness-based stress reduction on anxiety: a meta-analysis
abstract: Systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials evaluating mindfulness-based stress reduction for generalized anxiety disorder.
reason: Meta-analysis (not primary RCT), psychiatry not cardiology

title: Randomized trial of apixaban versus warfarin in atrial fibrillation
abstract: Double-blind randomized trial comparing apixaban with warfarin for prevention of stroke and systemic embolism in patients with atrial fibrillation. Primary outcome was stroke or systemic embolism.

title: Baricitinib in patients with rheumatoid arthritis: a randomized trial
abstract: Phase 3 randomized double-blind placebo-controlled trial of baricitinib in patients with active rheumatoid arthritis who had inadequate response to methotrexate. Primary endpoint was ACR20 response at week 12.

title: Ivabradine in chronic heart failure: the SHIFT trial
abstract: Randomised double-blind placebo-controlled trial of ivabradine in patients with chronic heart failure and left ventricular systolic dysfunction. Primary composite endpoint of cardiovascular death or hospital admission for worsening heart failure.
reason: Cardiology RCT + heart failure + heart rate reduction

title: Canagliflozin and cardiovascular events in type 2 diabetes: CANVAS Program
abstract: Integrated analysis of two randomized trials (CANVAS and CANVAS-R) evaluating canagliflozin versus placebo on cardiovascular outcomes in patients with type 2 diabetes and high cardiovascular risk.

title: Qualitative study of patient experiences after cardiac surgery
abstract: Qualitative interview study exploring patient experiences, recovery patterns, and psychosocial impacts following coronary artery bypass grafting surgery.
reason: Qualitative study (not RCT), despite cardiology topic

title: Alirocumab versus placebo in hypercholesterolemia: ODYSSEY OUTCOMES
abstract: Randomized double-blind placebo-controlled trial of alirocumab (PCSK9 inhibitor) in patients after acute coronary syndrome. Primary endpoint was a composite of coronary heart disease death, nonfatal myocardial infarction, fatal or nonfatal ischemic stroke, or unstable angina requiring hospitalization.

title: Cost-effectiveness of biologics in psoriasis: a systematic review
abstract: Systematic review of cost-effectiveness analyses comparing biologic therapies for moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis.

title: Spironolactone in heart failure with preserved ejection fraction: TOPCAT
abstract: Randomized double-blind placebo-controlled trial of spironolactone in patients with heart failure with preserved ejection fraction. Primary outcome was composite of cardiovascular death, aborted cardiac arrest, or hospitalization for heart failure.

title: Amoxicillin versus placebo for acute otitis media in children
abstract: Randomized double-blind placebo-controlled trial evaluating amoxicillin for acute otitis media in children aged 6-35 months. Primary outcome was symptom resolution at day 7.
reason: RCT but pediatric infectious disease, not cardiology

title: Percutaneous coronary intervention versus CABG in left main disease: EXCEL
abstract: Randomized trial comparing percutaneous coronary intervention with everolimus-eluting stents versus coronary artery bypass grafting in patients with left main coronary artery disease. Primary endpoint was composite of death, stroke, or myocardial infarction at 3 years.

title: Animal model of myocardial ischemia-reperfusion injury
abstract: Experimental study in murine model investigating the molecular mechanisms of ischemia-reperfusion injury and potential cardioprotective strategies using novel small molecule inhibitors.
reason: Animal study (not human RCT) despite cardiology topic

title: Rivaroxaban with or without aspirin in stable cardiovascular disease: COMPASS
abstract: Randomized double-blind trial comparing rivaroxaban plus aspirin, rivaroxaban alone, or aspirin alone in patients with stable atherosclerotic vascular disease. Primary outcome was composite of cardiovascular death, stroke, or myocardial infarction.

title: Genetic predictors of statin response: a genome-wide association study
abstract: Genome-wide association study identifying genetic variants associated with LDL cholesterol response to statin therapy in 40,000 participants from multiple cohorts.
